content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 17, 2002


Steve Kennedy
PAC Co-Chair
Tulare County Deputy Sheriff's Association
20000 Road 140
Tulare, CA 93274

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-255

Dear Sergeant Kennedy:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of September 17, 2002, you have rescinded your request for written advice.

As we discussed, enclosed you will find Information Manual C. Please refer to page 71 for information on making charitable contributions.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll-free at 866/275-3772.

Sincerely,

Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division

Enclosure

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to Steve Kennedy, PAC Co-Chair of the Tulare County Deputy Sheriff's Association. The letter informs him that his request for written advice has been rescinded and refers him to Information Manual C, page 71, for information on making charitable contributions. It also provides a toll-free number for additional questions. The letter is signed by Kevin S. Moen, PhD, Political Reform Consultant II, Technical Assistance Division.
